trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: tighten default-deny permissions by requiring the `mentor` role for mentor-assignment-based student access.
scope: Update `canAccessStudent` so mentor access requires both an active mentor assignment and the `mentor` role; add regression coverage and update MVP evidence logs/manifests.
changes: Updated `canAccessStudent` to require the `mentor` role in addition to an active `mentor_assignments` row before granting access to a student record.
Added a permission-helper regression test proving mentor assignments do not grant access when the `mentor` role is missing.
Updated MVP requirement evidence and added this structured run manifest.
known_limits: This run tightens application-level access checks; the schema does not enforce that `mentor_assignments.mentor_user_id` must also have a `mentor` role row.
next_actions: Add admin provisioning guards so mentor assignments cannot be created unless the mentor role is present (and audit the role/assignment change together).
Continue broadening protected-evidence and permission-edge test coverage (program/cohort scoping, inactive accounts, deleted records).
